ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gps_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "prn" INTEGER /* PRN (Pseudo-Random Noise) code of the GPS signal */,
  "gps_week_number" INTEGER /* GPS week number */,
  "sv_health_bits" TEXT /* SV (Space Vehicle) health bits */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Eccentricity of the satellite's orbit */,
  "almanac_reference_time" INTEGER /* Almanac reference time */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the GPS data */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the GPS data in bytes */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gps_data_prn FOREIGN KEY ("prn") REFERENCES satellites ("satellite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellites" (
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite */,
  "satellite_name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite */,
  "orbital_parameters" TEXT /* Orbital parameters of the satellite */,
  "satellite_type" TEXT /* Type of satellite */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the satellite */,
  "orbital_slot" TEXT /* Orbital slot of the satellite */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the satellite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gps_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal */,
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the satellite that received the signal */,
  "signal_quality" REAL /* Quality of the signal */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Strength of the signal */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of GPS signal */,
  "signal_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the GPS signal */,
  "signal_bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth of the GPS signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gps_signals_satellite_id FOREIGN KEY ("satellite_id") REFERENCES satellites ("satellite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the permission */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data that was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_log_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES gps_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each data point
PRN (Pseudo-Random Noise) code of the GPS signal
Size of the GPS data in bytes
Date and time when the data was created
Date and time when the data was last updated
ID of the satellite that received the signal
Password of the user (hashed for security)
ID of the user who has the permission

ID of the data that was accessed
